reviews.review_text: luv red dead, online is far better played in a private meta - all kinds of discords out there that offer gameplay on a private meta so you're not alone and you have a community to grow with and you can dodge the griefers and modders. wish rockstar would put a little more into red dead since it abandoned it in 2022. we still get some monthly and weekly perks, but it would be nice to see some new content on red dead especially with how unique the game is. it could've been a bigger money maker if it would've been properly advertised back at it's release. people don't realize red dead is quite literally just the 1890s cowboy version of grand theft auto 5. i love it. i love the aesthetics and the roles and the variety offered within the world even without new content. it could make more money if it had new purchase-able content - petition for rockstar to un-abandon red dead, maybe after the release of GTA VI (probably a pipe dream but a girl can hope)

awesome game, shame yall abandoned it. the game is amazing if you get rid of the fragile masculinity some of the men in game has, if ur a woman and choose the female skin, be prepared to be brutally harrased, love the game otherwise
The hackers make the game worse than it actually is. Your money WILL get wiped. you WILL get blown up. You WILL have a fun time playing. 8.9/10
game servers are awful , i cant stay 15 min in a server without getting disconnected , the game is fun and the world looks amazing but with these server errors its unplayable, cant recommend.

Pretty fun game, especially if you buy it on sale. People go crazy with modding in this game, and Rockstar seems to do absolutely nothing about it unfortunately. At this point, one of the best things you can do is have at least one person in your party who does some form of modding, so when you get terrorized or teleported away from your mission, they can at least teleport you back.

Also, do not bother people who use mods, because apparently they can track you through other servers. Even if you leave, I believe they can collect your IP. You'd think a AAA company like Rockstar Games would have a better standard for this, but I guess they do not really care because they are focused on Grand Theft Auto VI.

Uninstalled after 7 hours. As a solo player, the progression feels nearly impossible without spending real money. In game cash is too hard to come by—I barely had $50 after buying basic necessities like ammo. The world felt empty and silent, mostly consisting of just skinning wildlife. When I did run into other players, I was massively outgunned by high-level players. Wanted to love it, but it’s just not solo-friendly or fun early on.

Consider this the Western GTA. If you want to make it, gotta spend that in-game $$.

I love red dead, as a game its amazing, I played the hell out of it on my xbox, but what spoils it for me on PC are the d**k heads that decide to hack the game and spawn you to one central point with all the other players then a random shooting match ensues, all the while you are just going about your business trying to enjoy and play the game, or the ar*e monkey that spawns randomly at each player on the map to kill them just to grief people for fun... its because of people like these that the game will likely no doubt be dead very soon as I dont see Rockstar doing sod all to fix this issue...
Literally unplayable. I've seen more error messages in a day than the whole last year.

Loved the game but you can't go 15 minutes without someone cheating the game and just messing with you anymore. Constantly having to leave the game just to get rid of them just to reload in and everything else. No longer worth it. It's dead, just like GTA online. Too many idiots on the game to actually be able to enjoy it anymore.

I used to like playing this game, but then people decided it's okay to hack and or cheat in the game, all I have done is mind my own business while playing and some other random player(s) would kill me in the game for no reason at all, sometimes repeatedly, so I don't play it anymore, also uninstalled the game, so unless someone were to crack down on the hackers in the game, I'm not touching this game any longer.

Fun to solo and relax to get away from reality even if its just for a little while... plus there's horses! So yes I'll keep playing for that and to relax and watch the weather and ambience music and noises.

Great fun with or without friends
I play this mostly with my friend Bob and it is so much fun. I have a cowboy outfit and I look so cool with it in the game.
hi guys  this game is good i love it  but we need to kill the rat when we see it not when he  has the HIGH GROUND ( i dont beg for point but if you give point i appreciate )
Setup a private server and you won't have to deal with stupid hackers. Otherwise hackers are everywhere, ruining the game.
Great online experience with a beautiful open world, fun missions, and lots of activities. Exploring the Wild West with friends is always enjoyable. Definitely worth playing
It's one of my favorite games that I keep going back to. Just purchased on steam, played on console before.

I bought this game back in 2024, never downloaded it, but when I finally did it refused to open. I tried every fix under the sun (Outside of getting a new PC) and it refuses to open. The one time I did get it to open, it crashed my whole PC, and now refuses to start again. If you get it to run it seems like a fun game, but I for whatever reason can't get it to run.

(PS. I already requested a refund for this game. Rockstar fix this and I would love to try again, but until then sorry, not sorry.)

Red dead 2 online is long dead, the chance of it getting any more updates is near zero. that being said, between here and console I have 2 level 100 characters and get endless enjoyment roleplaying and messing around in rd2 online, i truly love this game regardless.

10/10 some of the best Lasso throwing psychopaths in the online portion of the game.

Singleplayer is a must play. Wife approved also.

the game's looks will outshine many new games built in Unreal Engine. Performance and looks wise

Cant go anywhere without cheaters trolling, it's like we're not even allowed to enjoy games anymore. I don't remember how long I've had this game, but almost every day I've had it, It's just been a bummer to not even be able to play without get cyber bullied. I want to like this game, to play it, but until it's playable; I just can't. I regret every cent I spent on this game. And it's just unfortunate that the "players" are ruining what could be a genuine entertaining experience.

I do recommend this game to others, as it is a really beautiful game with fantastic mechanics, and also because I would like more like-minded folks to interact with in game. The problem is, most of the lobbies are filled with modders and hackers. I just had an encounter with it, got all of my money stolen (close to $200) that I had been building towards something. I am still early level, and I didn't get to enjoy this game when it was thriving.... Otherwise, wonderful game.

Loved the game but you cant go 15 minutes without someone cheating the game and just messing with you anymore. I really do recommend this game. just not red dead online. Red dead online is not that fun I didn't even really touch it. I have a lot of hours because of the story. I made the mistake of buying this, seeing it wasn't good and wasted more money on the story that came with online. (Hours came from story just on the online version because I didn't want to install another 150gb game.) If you really want rdr online, just buy rdr 2
https://store.steampowered.com/app/1174180/Red_Dead_Redemption_2/

Fun game, lots of stuff to do. I like how after a long day of earning gold and money I can just go fishing or chill at my camp. I'm enjoying the bounty hunter, trader and collector roles the most. Not a fan of Harriet, she drugged me then left me in bear territory so when I awoke I got mauled by a huge brown bear, didn't even have time to stand up LOL

Apart from dodging the people who cheat it's been fun. If you plan on getting this game, choose a good name for your rockstar account because that's what shows up to other people, not your characters name.
its really like bloody like actually good its like good graphics its perfect multiplayer too just buy it

would usually recommend this game but as of recently I have lost access to the email that my Rockstar account is supposed to send a verification code to and Rockstar support has just sucked in terms of trying to "fix" the issue trying to repeatedly get me to "reset my password" although I don't have access to the email required to in the first place, I know this review is on steam but I didn't know where else to put this so I decided to put it here, that being said though if you have no issues with your account then i do recommend this game, it is great, nice open world and looks very nice, been playing for years on various devices and i still love it

I wish cross-platform play was possible because I have everything I need and more in RDO on Xbox. I'll be playing on PC in RP (roleplay) servers mainly, which is one of the best features on PC. I hope you enjoy!
